ModuleTitle.helper: Administrator-facing title for this content block. This also helps OpenContent sync with DNN module settings.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used to create #anchor-links on the page. Letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

Eyebrow.helper: Required. A short label above the main heading.

Heading.helper: Required. Main heading shown in the left content area.

HeadingCssClass.helper: Choose the heading color class. Keep this to text color classes only.

DescriptionText.helper: Required. A short paragraph or two works best.
DescriptionText.placeholder: A sanctuary of biodiversity nestled in the coastal redwood range...

LocationText.helper: Optional. Example: city, venue name, or service area.

LocationTextUrl.helper: Optional. When provided, the location text, button, and image will all link to this URL.

LocationTextUrlTarget.helper: Optional. Choose whether the link opens in the current window or a new tab. New-tab links automatically use noopener and noreferrer.

SideImage.helper: Required. Recommended minimum size: 1200px wide by 900px tall. A landscape image usually works best.
